channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T00:10Z — 1244 outages, 57,068 customers, 371 fair-weather, 13 DC-proximate
item.description: NJ-ACE: 2449 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH: 2395 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | VA-DOM: 2184 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VAWV-APCO: 2041 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-ACE: 2021 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
